# Diagrams Index

All architectural and workflow diagrams for the Everything Claude Code project.

| [Module Dependency Graph](module-dependency-graph.md) | flowchart TD | Hexagonal architecture crate dependencies across 6 Rust crates |

| [Build Pipeline](build-pipeline.md) | flowchart LR | Rust compilation, testing, linting, and release build |

## Command Workflow Diagrams

One diagram per slash command, showing the execution flow.

| Diagram | Type | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| [/spec](cmd-spec.md) | flowchart TD | Spec-driven pipeline: grill-me, spec draft, adversarial review |
| [/verify](cmd-verify.md) | flowchart TD | Build, tests, lint, code review, arch review, coverage, dead code |
| [/build-fix](cmd-build-fix.md) | flowchart TD | Detect errors, classify, fix incrementally, verify |
| [/e2e](cmd-e2e.md) | flowchart TD | Discover flows, generate Playwright tests, run, capture artifacts |
| [/doc-suite](cmd-doc-suite.md) | flowchart TD | Plan, sync, analyze, generate, validate, diagrams, coverage |
| [/audit](cmd-audit.md) | flowchart TD | 7 parallel domain audits, cross-correlation, report |
| [/backlog](cmd-backlog.md) | flowchart TD | Add, challenge, optimize, store, list, promote |
| [/uncle-bob-audit](cmd-uncle-bob-audit.md) | flowchart TD | Invoke robert agent, oath evaluation, rework ratio, self-audit |
| [/party](cmd-party.md) | flowchart TD | Multi-agent round-table: topic → enumeration → panel selection → sequential dispatch → synthesis |

## Feature Implementation Diagrams

Generated by `/implement` Phase 7.5. These are one-time snapshots that capture cross-module flows, state machines, and dependency changes while implementation context is fresh. Not subject to `/doc-suite` regeneration.

| Diagram | Type | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| [Worktree Auto-Merge and Cleanup — Sequence](features/worktree-auto-merge-cleanup-sequence.md) | sequence | Session end merge hook → ecc-workflow rebase/verify/ff-merge → deferred cleanup at next gc |
| [Worktree GC Refactored — Flowchart](features/worktree-gc-refactored-flowchart.md) | flowchart | Port-based GC: list worktrees → parse session names → check staleness (age + pid) → remove or skip |
| [Tool Manifest Resolution](tool-manifest-resolution.md) | flowchart + class | BL-146 declarative tool manifest: YAML → domain parse → resolver → effective tool list |
